hard_core.requirement: Every lane and internal work item states relation_to_hard_core: core wager, or belt with its legitimacy/byproduct function.
hard_core.agent_capability_role: Test whether agents can perform typed change reasoning across heterogeneous domains: distinguish possibility, dynamics, records, access, resources, executable capability, containment, and finality, or abstain honestly when the type is underdetermined.
hard_core.agent_role_provenance: Joe clarified the agent-capability role and its separation from the falsifiable research object in direct chat, 2026-07-16.
hard_core.lane_doctrine: Lane 1 is always the aggressive boundary-pushing core wager. Belt lanes (adapters, gates, packet machinery, legitimacy infrastructure) may legitimately LEAD priority when required for the legitimacy of the research/methodology, or when a byproduct is exciting enough (papers, potential spin-off repos). Invariant: once those resolve, priority shifts back to the core and continues pushing.
hard_core.belt_lane_record_2026_07_16: The Rank-2 runway (two-phase preregistration, firewalled packet drafts, independent Frame R re-freeze) is a belt lane that correctly LED while the legitimacy of the adjudication methodology required it. That runway is laid; priority now reverts to the core wager. Joe ratified this doctrine and record in direct chat, 2026-07-16.
hard_core.rank2_resolution_2026_07_16: The preregistered Rank-2 adjudication (RANK2-PR-001) EXECUTED on sovereign TAF-001 + TI-PIT-002 evidence (both accepted and imported, all gates PASS; prereg_verify all seven gates PASS). Referee-governed verdict: NO Rank-2 outcome licensed, construal-invariant; c4 access-side ROBUST_ZERO observed on both branches; c5 NOT_APPLICABLE (sovereign factor-declaration practice does not match the check's capability vocabulary -- successor needs a NEW prereg id); c6 missed; TI frame leg quarantine-blocked. Rank 2 is UNDISCHARGED with a narrowed prerequisite; the successor prereg is a banked belt item, NOT the next swing. The runway belt lane is RESOLVED: per the lane doctrine invariant, priority reverts to the core wager (P2C-REAL-PHYSICAL-WITNESS, rank 1). Record: explorations/2026-07-16-rank2-adjudication/.
hard_core.provenance: Joe ratified the five-persona panel synthesis with his own doctrine refinement, 2026-07-16, direct chat (trusted control channel).

selection_contract.physics_specimen_rule: Physical witnesses are severe specimens inside Lane 1, not the scope of the lane. The same typed definitions and null/completion discipline must transfer to nonphysical cases without analogy-only substitutions.
selection_contract.no_third_lane_for_meta_role: Typed change reasoning is the evaluation lens on Lane 1's falsifiable hierarchy research, not a separate meta lane and not a replacement North Star. Lane 2 hardens the hierarchy, casebook, literature position, and reader reproducibility that make Lane 1 trustworthy.
selection_contract.reach_swing_cadence: Every third Progress swing must be a reach swing: attempt a real theorem over a native formalism, a real physical witness, or a source-grounded cross-domain transition adjudication. A failed reach swing is preserved as a first-class result, never suppressed or retried silently. Ratified by Joe 2026-07-16 and broadened by the same-day agent-capability role clarification.
selection_contract.reach_swing_accounting_2026_07_16: Since the last reach swing (P2C-REAL-PHYSICAL-WITNESS, commit ba1a055): witness-boundary-adapter (1), cross-repo combining adjudication (2), completion-class firewall swing (3), then the 2026-07-16 BEC/superfluid circulation reach swing. The reach obligation is discharged at exploration tier by an independent-domain neutral carrier replication. Next Progress may return to adapter consolidation or spend another reach swing only if the selected frontier explicitly warrants it.
selection_contract.reach_swing_accounting_2026_07_16i: After the BEC reach swing, two material non-reach swings executed: carrier-neutral adapter consolidation and P2C-W1 second-standard local adjudication. Joe's agent-capability role clarification now directs the due reach swing to P2C-CROSS-DOMAIN-TRANSITION-ADJUDICATION. A source-grounded nonphysics fixture is a harder transfer test of the hierarchy's meaning than another same-domain carrier refinement.
selection_contract.minimum_material_output: A model, theorem target, proof, counterexample, executable discriminator, or source-grounded case adjudication. A new schema, queue, packet wrapper, or narrative alone is insufficient.

artifact_role: Repository-owned work and ranking portfolio. Durable Lane definitions and control state exist only in root LANES.yaml.

work_groups.relation_to_hard_core: IS the core wager: force or falsify whether the hierarchy can classify what kind of change occurred across real heterogeneous cases without collapsing disclosure, access, resources, capability, containment, and finality. The agent-capability role is evaluated by this work but does not replace the research object. Always the aggressive boundary-pushing lane; never demoted by difficulty.
work_groups.purpose: Test the hierarchy through source-grounded transition adjudications across physical and nonphysical domains, with declared frames, tasks, resources, completion rivals, invariance tests, and honest abstention. Boundary adapters and physical witnesses are work items inside this purpose, not the lane's scope.
work_groups.current_authority: The superconducting-ring and neutral-BEC fixtures show that the typed diagnostic can survive two carrier-distinct physical specimens at finite-model exploration grade. The TAF-001 and 2026-07-19 CAI entryway fixtures show scoped nonphysics transfer over record/access and governance-routing inputs. The boundary-externality discriminator remains the accepted source-neutral gate for future boundary packets and must not be promoted into external-reality evidence. P2C-XFRAME-001 establishes a bounded common primitive refinement with representation invariance and an INDEXED_CONSTRUCTION_FORK. P2C-DESCENT-001 proves at finite conditional grade that facts and frame verdicts descend while no faithful single Access/Capability head commutes across N and R on the calibrated class. P2C-IRD-001 now realizes the indexed story over raw transitions: direct fibers equal typed W restrictions, N and S have minimum hold costs 1 and 0, and every successful equalization changes preparation, resources, interface-labelled actions, or horizon. The result is RESTRICTION_PROFILE_SEPARATION_SCOPED, not physical or universal. The GU co-flip freeze passes source-pin preflight but is not discriminator-adjudicable because the transition, matched frames, task delta, native response, completion rival, and independent identity are absent; honest classification abstains before Boolean defaults invent a result. ADAPTER2-01 remains OPEN and must not be retried without its reopen burden. The next high-information move is a source-grounded Hamiltonian or physical transition specimen using the IRD contract; do not repeat the four-state toy or execute the GU adoption ladder as authority.
work_groups.mailbox_2026_07_19_gu_source_object_crit: Accepted as repo-local stewardship and ranking evidence only. GU reports that GR-track live candidates are gated on a not-yet-existing source-owned object with vacuum support, trace-free Q^TF(B)-slot cancellation at O(M^2), preservation of cheap linear reads, and possibly a C9 higher-codimension first variation with a pre-frozen coefficient. Disposition: no P2C packet import, no GU truth movement, no technical swing, and no external action. Re-open P2C work only when GU routes the promised frozen source-object interface contract, issues the source-owned object, or supplies a source-issued packet that P2C can validate under frozen-packet discipline.
work_groups.mailbox_2026_07_19_gu_construction_space: Accepted as repo-local stewardship and ranking evidence only. GU reports source revision 995857d316b4e506c1262ab72d5b210eb8995add and source pointers lab/process/source-object-interface-contract.md, lab/process/construction-space-map.json, and tests/recovery-contract/construction_space_source_object_spec_p5.py as the constraint-side interface for any future P2C source-owned packet. The interface requires one shared source object across GR, QM, COSMO, and SM and names forbidden shortcuts including target-shaped stress import, positive Hilbert space by assumption, standard SVT variables as GU evidence, and host group selector substitution. Disposition: interface pointer recorded; no P2C packet import, no GU truth movement, no technical swing, and no external action. Re-open P2C technical work only when a source-owned object or source-issued packet is available for frozen-packet validation against this interface.

GU reports a late channel-fanout sharpening of the finite payload shape: the branch item is deleted by computation, the subgroup-chain item is likely derivable, the scale is a pinned point near rho_DE^(1/4) = 2.24 meV, and the remaining independent integer candidate is generations N -> 3. The note also reports SRC-COH-1 as a toy-grade coherence condition and says residual obstruction remains at the global Y14 spectral-section datum. work_groups.mailbox_2026_07_19_instance_ladder_and_e: Accepted as repo-local stewardship and ranking evidence only. GU reports a candidate Z/2 habitat in pi_1(GL(4,R)/O(3,1)), a proposed two-sector flat-holonomy/Kramers-control witness ladder, and D-77-ETA demand for J-breaking end data with connected admissible-section space and a nontrivial mod-2 index certificate pinning eta/rank to 3. Disposition: wait-only source signal recorded; no P2C packet import, no GU truth movement, no technical swing, no claim-status movement, no public posture movement, no external action, and no reconstruction from the mailbox note. work_groups.rerank_2026_07_16: P2C-REAL-PHYSICAL-WITNESS promoted above P2C-BOUNDARY-ADAPTER via explicit rank fields; honest priority scores unchanged (27 adapter, 25 witness). Rationale (five-persona panel, Joe ratified 2026-07-16 in direct chat): pick the real system first and let it discipline the definitions, rather than perfecting the adapter in the abstract and fitting a system to it.
work_groups.kill_condition: If the same definitions cannot distinguish transition types across source-grounded domains, competent readers cannot reproduce the classification, or every candidate reduces to description, access, resources, fixed dynamics, or legitimate completion, preserve the scoped failure and revise the hierarchy rather than inventing capability.
work_groups.forbidden_shortcut: Do not treat analogy, fluent narrative, a packet schema, irreversible process, stochastic outcome, added label, or domain-specific relabeling as typed adjudication. Do not spend an hourly run retrying ADAPTER2-01 without new native source or target structure that meets its reopen burden.

internal_work_items.relation_to_hard_core: Core wager through a falsifier/control interface: P2C must distinguish outside/local-patch, fixed condition, resource flow, access change, record formation, executable capability change, completion, and finality before it can combine boundary-source packets without smuggling in a desired verdict.
internal_work_items.intake_2026_07_18: Accepted the 2026-07-17 System mailbox proposal as repo-local steering and ranking evidence only. It corrects the boundary language after the self-excitation swing: P2C has not established a physical firewall, a signal from outside the universe, GU external reality, or any source-repo verdict. Preserve candidate classes until killed or merged: apparent boundary/representation, static global datum, initial or boundary condition, two-ended/final-boundary/fixed-point condition, observer or agent selection split into epistemic readout and physical intervention, autonomous bulk-boundary feedback, edge/defect/membrane/anomaly-inflow degrees, enlarged-system resource reservoir, stochastic environment/noise, native source current or law-like update, and meta-system or ensemble selection.
internal_work_items.swing_2026_07_18: Executed the carrier-neutral boundary externality/signal discriminator at exploration tier. Added tests/boundary_externality_signal_discriminator.py and explorations/2026-07-18-boundary-externality-discriminator/SYNTHESIS.md. Result: BOUNDARY_EXTERNALITY_SIGNAL_DISCRIMINATOR / MODEL_RELATIVE_ADVANCE. The fixture classifies or abstains on the preserved intake classes using interface, condition-vs-signal status, transfer, timing, closure, resource/access frame, task delta, completion absorption, after-fact encoding, source-packet dependency, and observable null distinction. It blocks fixed conditions, resource changes, access readouts, after-fact encodings, and source-native current labels from being relabeled as capability or delivered signal. Positive calibration reaches CAPABILITY_CHANGE_CANDIDATE_NO_FINALITY only with closed state-dependent feedback, matched resource and access frame, and matched task delta. Validation: fixture exit 0; strict TEF lint clean; headline 13 [E] + 5 [F] = 18. No outside-universe, source truth, GU firewall, capability, finality, CAI, Church, public-posture, or external-action claim moved.
internal_work_items.rerank_2026_07_18: Advanced out of active hourly selection for current inputs. Re-open only when a source-issued frozen packet, new boundary candidate, or failing control needs the discriminator. Otherwise the next eligible frontier should return to source-grounded transfer or real-witness work under the existing rank order.
internal_work_items.next_swing: The GU co-flip freeze has been preflighted and returns ABSTAIN_PACKET_NOT_ADJUDICABLE before discriminator invocation. Do not repeat this preflight or coerce unknown frame fields into booleans. Re-open when one frozen input supplies independent identity, a before/after transition, matched resource and access frames, task delta, native response, and a strongest completion rival, or when a new candidate kind exposes a different schema failure.
internal_work_items.swing_2026_07_20_coflip_preflight: Executed a source-grounded admissibility preflight for GU-COFLIP-HOLONOMY-FREEZE-2026-07-20 at source commit 32e3603. Result: ABSTAIN_PACKET_NOT_ADJUDICABLE. The source freeze is pinned, but seven discriminator prerequisites are missing: independent source identity, transition frame, matched resource budget, matched access frame, matched task delta, native response, and completion rival. The Hamiltonian nonclaim is preserved. The existing Boolean discriminator cannot represent unknown frame fields neutrally: true invents matching and false misstates missing evidence as demonstrated mismatch. Validation: 10 [E] + 2 [F] = 12, exit 0; base discriminator exit 0; strict TEF lint clean. No ladder execution, packet import, GU truth, capability, finality, canon, or public posture moved.
internal_work_items.success_condition: A reproducible discriminator classifies or abstains on the preserved boundary-source classes using unchanged hierarchy vocabulary, explicit nulls, and no source-repo sovereignty violation.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: The taxonomy collapses into prose labels, requires a GU/TI/TaF truth verdict, cannot state an observable null distinction, or treats representation/access/resource/fixed-family/history selection as capability change by relabeling.
internal_work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Do not call an adapter outside the universe, a boundary datum a signal, or a source current native/forced unless the source repository has said so. Do not create a new hierarchy type from initiation versus maintenance unless multiple source-grounded domains force it.

internal_work_items.rerank_2026_07_19: Advanced for current CAI quick-load input and made non-hourly until new source-issued nonphysics evidence appears. The next eligible hourly frontier returns to P2C-REAL-PHYSICAL-WITNESS Alternate B / harder real-witness transfer.
internal_work_items.success_condition: One nonphysics case receives a reproducible typed verdict or principled abstention using unchanged definitions, explicit counterfactuals, and a completion/null attack; the result identifies what changed and what did not without relying on metaphor.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: The classification requires domain-specific redefinition, hides a resource or access change inside capability, cannot state an executable task, or changes when the same evidence is competently reframed under an admissible representation.
internal_work_items.forbidden_shortcut: Do not use a merely illustrative analogy or a case whose desired classification is embedded in its labels. Source-ground the transition and make the failing direction executable.
internal_work_items.candidate_lead: Continuity Ledger K0 individuation and after-the-fact relabeling is an unverified lead supplied outside P2C. It becomes eligible only through a source-issued, frozen, provenance-bearing CL packet. Do not reconstruct or accept the source finding from a peer note; if no packet exists, choose another controlled case.

internal_work_items.rerank_2026_07_16f: Promoted to rank 1 after P2C-NULL-COMPLETION-CLOSURE resolved (derived firewall, D2 closed at model grade). Lane doctrine invariant: belt resolved -> core wager leads. The NEXT Progress swing on this item is the designated REACH swing (see selection_contract.reach_swing_accounting_2026_07_16): Alternate C (BEC quantized circulation, independent domain replication) or Alternate B (topological entanglement entropy gamma=log D). Both are now triply motivated: C4 per-construction transfer, F5 watch, and the completion-closure result's own transfer test -- the composite attack reached Q and P, so the first question for any new witness model is whether its local-invariance leg is stronger or weaker than the ring's.
internal_work_items.relation_to_hard_core: Core wager, most direct form: the hard core's claim is diagnosable-on-real-physical-cases, and this item supplies the real case. Led and executed a REACH swing 2026-07-16.
internal_work_items.swing_2026_07_16: REACH swing executed (Joe-authorized, direct chat). Survey of 8 physical systems across domains; picked the superconducting ring (quantized persistent supercurrent, BCS/Ginzburg-Landau) as the strongest non-toy capability candidate under Joe's frontier constraint. Candidate boundary event: cool N->S with flux present -> hold a quantized, locally-invariant, zero-maintenance-cost persistent circulating memory, a task absent in N at any budget. Strongest steelman rival: whole-family disclosure (fixed phase diagram) backed by seed(value) + metastability(persistence), at matched resource. Discriminator: fluxoid staircase (D-Q) + winding local-invariance (D-I) + persistence (D-P), first two measurable and real (Deaver-Fairbank/Doll-Nabauer 1961). Executable: tests/physical_witness_discriminator.py (exit 0, --strict clean, 7 [E] + 4 [F] = 11). Referee-governed disposition: SURVIVES_LOCAL_COMPLETIONS / UNDISCHARGED_VS_WHOLE_FAMILY, frame-indexed to a matched-budget counterfactual pair (R-D1). Candidate is NOT reduced by any local completion class on two measurable signatures; it survives only by refusing to admit the target phase into the fixed family -- the fixed-family absorber (falsifier F1), a cross-repo (TaF+TI) adjudication, NOT P2C-local. No enlargement verdict licensed. Files: explorations/2026-07-16-real-physical-witness/{SYNTHESIS,WITNESS-FREEZE,REFEREE-REPORT}.md. Success condition MET at exploration tier, scoped to the declared frame; item advanced with an open frontier, not closed.

The neutral superfluid/BEC circulation fixture transfers the QIP discriminator away from superconducting charged-pair/fluxoid primitives: quantized neutral winding, local phase-relabel invariance, and persistence survive local completions; composite local absorbers reach Q and P but not I; whole-family-with-condensate still absorbs. Fixture exit 0, strict TEF lint clean, headline 7 [E] + 4 [F] = 11. This discharges the current reach-swing obligation at exploration tier but leaves the F1 whole-family seam live.

W1 adds order-two loop composition and executable sector-count honesty against integer-winding and four-sector mimics. W3 freezes P2C-native identity, assumptions, non-retuning, construction fork, deletion test, and falsifiers without retroactively creating provenance for the GU packet. The whole-family absorber remains live; no exact-Hamiltonian specimen, transition adjudication, capability, finality, source truth, packet import, canon, or public posture moved.
internal_work_items.swing_2026_07_20_discrete_gfe: Commit 6305b86 executed the bounded primary-paper gate against arXiv:2404.08556. Steward disposition: K-d-qualified specimen CANDIDATE at exploration tier, with the K-c residue inseparable. The d=1 ring member realizes a genuine order-two full-link holonomy sector on the paper's exact self-adjoint matter operator and passes the finite W1-W3 legs; the naive sigma embedding is exactly datum-free, while the paper's d=2 worked-example class fails the blindness leg. The paper does not supply a Hamiltonian role, time evolution, or a dynamical transition; H := D is a standard-field completion, the extraction still needs hand verification against the published PDF, and the whole-family absorber remains live. Validation recorded and rerun: 16 [E] + 6 [F] = 22, 4 [T] separate, exit 0; strict TEF lint clean. No capability, issuance, finality, source truth, packet import, canon, public posture, or external action moved.
internal_work_items.primary_verification_2026_07_20_discrete: A bounded primary-source pass verified the two load-bearing formulas against arXiv:2404.08556v4. The PDF's Eq. (6) confirms the opposite-phase positive/negative incidence coupling, and Eq. (10) confirms the metric-conjugated block exterior derivative; Eq. (12) is the component decomposition and Eq. (13) defines D = d + d^dagger. The arXiv HTML labels the first two displays Eq. (12) and Eq. (22), explaining the exploration's inherited citations. Formula use is confirmed and citations corrected; Hamiltonian role, dynamical transition, whole-family absorption, capability, issuance, and finality remain open or unclaimed.
internal_work_items.candidate_lead_2026_07_17: Conway's Game of Life is banked as a second-witness adversarial lead, not the current next swing. Its value is that the whole-family absorber is maximally strong in a fixed deterministic rule system; admission requires a precise boundary event, before/after task set, completion/null attack, and an explicit answer to why a toy-adjacent executable fixture earns a second-witness slot. The nested-questions/free-will framing is banked only as a Lane 2 byproduct lead about descriptive-truth vs positional-truth separation; it must not displace source-grounded typed adjudication.

internal_work_items.kill_condition: The candidate reduces to unpredictability, irreversibility, hidden state, changed resources, changed access, stochastic seed, or a completed-history description.

internal_work_items.success_condition: A typed nonconstant adapter acts on physical transition data, respects declared equivalences and composition, and exposes a testable residual without importing its polarity or verdict.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: Every candidate is constant, verdict-carrying, representation-dependent, or equivalent to adding the missing datum by hand.

internal_work_items.swing_2026_07_16e: Executed (Joe authorized, direct chat, 2026-07-16). CompletionClass-P2C v0.1 built and closed: nine channel constructors + certified/hull containment constructors, three claim classes, three admissibility axioms with pre-this-swing P2C provenance (A-FRAME = witness frame declaration + adapter RESOURCE_FRAME_CHANGED; A-UNIF = adapter verdict-carrying rejection; A-CAL = this item's own pre-declared kill condition). FIREWALL VERDICT: DERIVED, not stipulated and not refuted -- a theorem of the finite model from type-free axioms (hull totality + uniformity + non-constancy cap uncertified containment at representational; A-FRAME blocks in-frame upgrade of certified containment). The refutation branch was RUN: the unrestricted absorber reopens absorption and simultaneously collapses the instrument (constant verdict map, f2-fail). Scope binding per referee R1: derivation binds instrument-admissible standards only; C2 NARROWED (v1-table-relativity -> axiom-relativity), not eliminated. COMPOSITION (referee D2): class closed under sequential composition as a verified FIXPOINT (c4); no composite absorbs the witness (c1), the closure strictly exceeds the singles (c3, register target needs depth 2), and the escape is theorem-shaped (c2 carrier dichotomy). HEADLINE HONESTY: the composite attack comes within ONE signature of killing the scoped survivor -- composites reach Q and P; the entire escape hangs on local-op invariance (c1-fail). Kill condition checked executably in BOTH directions, NOT triggered (p1 breadth, p2/f1 restriction-with-bite). F1: legitimacy-standard remainder (a) DISCHARGED at exploration tier, model-relative; (b) narrowed; (c) individuation fork and (d) family-exhaustiveness untouched -- F1 LIVE, FURTHER NARROWED, now carried by fork/transfer legs. Fixture 11 [E] + 4 [F] = 15, strict lint clean, exit 0. Files: explorations/2026-07-16-completion-class-firewall/{COMPLETION-CLASS-P2C,SYNTHESIS,REFEREE-REPORT}.md + closure_output.txt; tests/p2c_completion_class_closure.py. Referee-governed; record stands as corrected.

internal_work_items.re_arm_2026_07_16: Re-arm condition branch 2 is now MET: CompletionClass-P2C v0.1 exists (explorations/2026-07-16-completion-class-firewall/) and is ready for a second-standard re-adjudication of P2C-W1. That re-adjudication is a LOCAL swing: it re-runs the completion leg under the P2C-owned standard using the frozen witness bundle and the already-imported sovereign packets read-only; it requires NO new cross-repo action and NO proposals. Ranked below the witness reach swing and the unblocked adapter rerun because the derived cap agrees with v1's in content, so the re-adjudication's information gain is confirmatory unless an axiom fails on contact.

Success condition MET at exploration tier in the scoped, class-split form: one unchanged witness, one declared frame, ONE argument chain through formation, completion (each declared class singly + the capped absorber; composite local completions UNTESTED, referee D2), capability (frame-indexed, C1 task-semantics mapping at definitional-draft grade), finality NOT_REACHED (vacuous leg, recorded not hidden), neutrality, no-artificial-success. Combined verdict: SCOPED SURVIVOR, CLASS-SPLIT -- frame-indexed capability change survives the declared completion family per-class including the whole-family absorber (whose legitimate strength caps at global/ontological under CompletionClass v1), while the witness is simultaneously legitimately absorbed at global/ontological strength (no absolute-novelty claim). Conditions binding on any citation: C1 mapping, C2 v1-relativity, C3 tau_P metastability cap, C4 individuation fork unforced (Located-Is-Not-Forced). Result: SECOND_STANDARD_CONFIRMED_SCOPED_SURVIVOR_CLASS_SPLIT. internal_work_items.resolution_2026_07_19_cross_frame: C4/F5 re-arm executed as preregistered P2C-XFRAME-001 (explorations/2026-07-19-cross-frame-descent-or-fork/; tests/cross_frame_descent_or_fork.py). Result: INDEXED_CONSTRUCTION_FORK. The unchanged P2C-W1 primitive profile and all frame outputs survive certified representation relabeling; N and R both classify the fixed-interface operational witness as nonconservative capability-shaped change; N and R disagree at top-label level on the access-only control; W is a material one-context construction fork reporting global containment without an operational pair. The common primitive profile is a bounded receiver-defined refinement, not a proved universal quotient. Initial false F5 output exposed and retained a partial-overlay loader ambiguity; the loader was repaired to preserve all unchanged facts under P4 without changing rules or predictions. Validation headline: 9 [E] + 7 [F] = 16; 1 [T] separate; strict lint clean. C1, tau_P cap, source sovereignty, finality NOT_REACHED, and the F5 watch remain binding.
internal_work_items.theorem_2026_07_19: P2C-DESCENT-001 proved at finite conditional grade (explorations/2026-07-19-profile-descent-theorem/; tests/profile_descent_theorem.py). Profiles and frame-specific verdicts factor uniquely through certified representation-equivalence quotients. The classifier-kernel quotient is the coarsest carrier retaining all declared frame outputs. A two-witness equality proof shows no common top-label quotient can commute on access-only and mechanism-change profiles while preserving N's Access/Capability distinction; R subtypes and the primitive profile retain the distinction. The six-presentation fixture enumerates all 203 partitions, obtains five joint-carrier classes, finds zero faithful commuting assignments and three after deliberate N-distinction collapse. Grade: theorem-level elementary finite mathematics relative to assumptions; P2C application finite conditional. No physics, universal hierarchy, source truth, issuance, or finality moved.
internal_work_items.ird_2026_07_19: P2C-IRD-001 executed and adversarially hardened (explorations/2026-07-19-indexed-restriction-diagram/; tests/indexed_restriction_diagram.py). Result: RESTRICTION_PROFILE_SEPARATION_SCOPED. Under one typed evaluation contract, N and S direct models equal explicit W restrictions; 40 policies per fiber are exhausted; minimum hold costs are 1 and 0; W directly contains an S realization. Carrier relabel is faithful; N/S functional correspondence fails on IDLE. COOL-as-evaluation, hold budget one, and N-only latch action equalize by preparation, resource, and interface-action construction changes respectively; horizon one makes both fail. The explicit N/S-forgetting quotient is nondeterministic and erases start embeddings. Adversarial hardening added explicit embeddings, a full task contract, direct W enumeration, constructed quotient, and index-erasure tests before acceptance. Validation: 7 [E] + 9 [F] = 16; 5 [T] separate; strict lint clean. Grade finite transition model only; no physics, universal ontology, source truth, issuance, or finality moved.
internal_work_items.next_swing: Do not repeat the four-state IRD toy. Apply the typed restriction contract to a source-grounded exact-Hamiltonian topological specimen or a finer physical P2C-W1 transition model, with origin/current-carrier identity, vector resources, multiple horizons, noise/error, carrier-neutral task semantics, and exact restriction maps. A local origin/current refinement is justified only as direct support for that application. Keep GU, CAI, and Continuity Ledger branches trigger-driven until source-owned packets or new accepted revisions arrive.
internal_work_items.success_condition: One unchanged witness survives the neutral formation, completion, capability, finality, and neutrality gates.
internal_work_items.kill_condition: The apparent pass combines different constructions, incompatible assumptions, or partial results.

handoffs.to_time_as_finality: Freeze and propose the same witness for an invariant capability-change adjudication; do not include a desired verdict.
handoffs.to_temporal_issuance: Freeze and propose the same witness for whole-family completion attack; do not assert source issuance.
handoffs.to_gu_formalization: Send only an adapter or witness packet whose interface is relevant to one frozen GU construction. GU retains native-versus-forced authority.
handoffs.return_activation: Any frozen sovereign return is a stewardship reranking signal, not automatic joint success.

May lead only per the lane doctrine; leadership reverts to the core when the leading item resolves.

work_groups.intake_2026_07_20_discrete_gfe_lead: Accepted the GU-routed TOE/discrete-GfE mailbox payload as an untrusted literature lead only. Primary arXiv abstracts verify that 2404.08556 proposes a cell-complex action using topological spinors and discrete Dirac operators, and that 2510.24491 derives semiclassical Einstein equations from relative entropy under stated assumptions. Neither abstract establishes an exact Hamiltonian, a one-loop two-sector realization, the P2C W1-W3 legs, or a matched before/after transition. GU transcript and claim-mining pointers remain unverified third-party material and were not admitted as evidence. Next bounded source-spine check: inspect primary 2404.08556 for an explicit Hamiltonian and a realizable order-two sector construction; abstain if either is absent. No packet import, source truth, capability, finality, canon, public posture, or construction movement occurred.

Its missing-section/native-reader line remains an unfrozen hypothesis because the proposal supplies no source-issued object, immutable revision, native Hamiltonian role, dynamical before/after frame, matched resource/access/task contract, or native response.
